findings: Features e23 to e32 show near-constant values with extremely low cardinality across the partition.
Distribution verification confirms low entropy and dominant values for sampled features (e23, e26).
Local consistency verification on e23 reveals label neighborhood conflicts despite low feature variability, indicating subtle deviations.
Tension between near-constant feature values and class-conditioned label variation is preserved but not fully resolved.
contradictions: High label neighborhood conflict in e23 despite near-constant feature values.
limitations: Analysis limited to partition-global scope without localized subpartition evidence.
Only a subset of features (e23, e26) underwent distribution and consistency verification due to step budget.
